column1: Crocodiles mums are the most caring mothers. They_________their babies safely down to the water in their mouth. (CARRY)
What is there in its mouth? - It's a baby crocodile. The mother_____________it down to the water. (CARRY)
When my sister was little she_________us a lot of questions though she__________the answer. (ASK/KNOW)
Why_______you__________a raincoat? It's sunny. There is not a cloud in the sky. (WEAR)
Why_______people_________such shoes? They are not comfortable. Besides they look ugly. (WEAR)
Yesterday I________up at 7 o'clock. I ____________my hands and face. I__________porridge for breakfast. At 7.30 I________the flat and___________to the bus stop. (GET/WASH/EAT/LEAVE/WALK)
He_____________a shower at the moment. Can he call you back? (HAVE)
